projects.title: Daily Notes App
projects.bodyText:
- A modern note-taking web application designed to help users organize daily tasks, ideas, and important notes efficiently.
 - Developed using modern web technologies with a focus on responsive design and user-friendly experience.
 - Features note creation, editing, deletion, and structured note management.
 - Implemented clean UI components and intuitive workflows to improve productivity and usability.
 - Built as a personal project to strengthen frontend development, state management, and application architecture skills.
